name: nVent Electric plc
description: nVent Electric plc is a global leader in electrical connection and protection solutions. The company designs, manufactures, markets, and services high-performance products that connect and protect sensitive equipment, buildings, and critical processes. Serving diverse sectors including data centers, industrial automation, commercial buildings, power utilities, and renewable energy, nVent provides innovative solutions that ensure safety and reliability. Headquartered in London with significant management operations in the United States, the company operates as an independent, publicly traded entity dedicated to advancing electrical infrastructure through its portfolio of trusted brands and engineering expertise.
